title: Add Local Verification Runner
summary: Add a canonical local verification script, optional git-hook installer, and aligned docs for daily use.
scope_items: Add a shared local verification entrypoint under core/python/tools.
Add an optional hook-install flow that wires local git hooks to the shared verification command.
Refresh README, validation standard, and review checklist guidance around the new local flow.
done_when_items: One documented local command covers the normal fast and broad verification loops.
Developers can install a local pre-push hook without hand-writing their own script.
